    LAWN-MEX INC

    SERVICES

    Let's Meet

    We are a family business.

    "Lawn Mex Inc is a family-run company, serving our community for over 25 years. Providing high quality lawn care services, design, landscaping, mowing, maintenance, construction and more. Serving the greater St. Louis metropolitan area, we are happy to service surrounding communities in Illinois and Missouri. We look forward to helping you create inviting, long-lasting and beautiful outdoor spaces to enjoy year-round."

    Testimonials

    I hired Lawn-Mex for a re-fresh on my landscaping beds las fall. They did such an excellent job, I called them this spring clean-up, pre-emergent in my flower beds and lay down mulch. I'm very pleased with their work and professionalism. Erika is super to work with and has great ideas!!!

    Donna Baker

    Great family owned business!! With great customer Service.

    Payton Hillman

    I had a wonderful experience with Jeff and his team at Lawn-Mex Inc. Jeff is an expert at what he does. He listened to my needs and understood my vision for how I needed to trim my trees. Jeff and his team did everything perfectly, even the cleanup. He is very professional, friendly, and thorough! I want to thank Jeff and his team for making the entire process seamless and efficient. The quality of their work and the value of their service are undeniable. I will now be a Lawn-Mex Inc. customer for life and will work with them for all my lawn care needs! PERFECTION!

    Cocco Butta.
